evidence: She put the cu-gura, the desert crown, on her head.[cite: 1]
She praised herself, full of delight at her genitals, she praised herself, full of delight at her genitals.[cite: 1]
I shall direct my steps to Enki, to the abzu, to Eridug...[cite: 1]
...and I myself shall speak coaxingly to him, in the abzu, in Eridug...[cite: 1]
I, Inana, personally intend to go to the abzu (1 ms. has instead: intend to go to Eridug).[cite: 1]
On that day the maiden Inana, holy Inana, directed her steps all by herself towards Enki's abzu in Eridug.[cite: 1]
On that day, he of exceptional knowledge, who knows the divine powers in heaven and earth, who from his own dwelling already knows the intentions of the gods...[cite: 1]
...Enki spoke to his man, gave him instructions: "Come here, my man, listen to my words."[cite: 1]
Pour beer for her, in front of the Lions Gate, make her feel as if she is in her girlfriend's house, make her ...... as a colleague.[cite: 1]
You are to welcome holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An.[cite: 1]
So it came about that Enki and Inana were drinking beer together in the abzu, and enjoying the taste of sweet wine.[cite: 1]
The bronze aga vessels were filled to the brim, and the two of them started a competition, drinking from the bronze vessels of Urac.[cite: 1]
Holy Inana received heroism, power, wickedness, righteousness, the plundering of cities, making lamentations, rejoicing.[cite: 1]
"In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will give them to holy Inana, my daughter..."[cite: 1]
Holy Inana received wisdom, attentiveness, holy purification rites, the shepherd's hut...[cite: 1]
"He has given me righteousness. He has given me the plundering of cities."[cite: 1]
"He has given me the craft of the carpenter. He has given me the craft of the coppersmith."[cite: 1]
"He has given me wisdom. He has given me attentiveness."[cite: 1]
But holy Inana had gathered up the divine powers and embarked onto the Boat of Heaven.[cite: 1]
As the effects of the beer cleared from him who had drunk beer... the great lord Enki turned his attention to the ...... building.[cite: 1]
"Where are the office of en priest, the office of lagal priest, divinity, the great and good crown, the royal throne?"[cite: 1]
"My master has given them to his daughter."[cite: 1]
They said: "By the bolt of the temple door, a frog spoke."[cite: 1]
Enki grasped the frog by his right paw.[cite: 1]
He received ...... the halub tree and his box-tree.[cite: 1]
"Go now! The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!"[cite: 1]
"What Enki spoke was very serious. His important words cannot be countermanded."[cite: 1]
"How could my father have changed what he said to me? How could he have altered his promise as far as I am concerned?"[cite: 1]
So Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven...[cite: 1]
"Inana, you have brought with you the office of en priest, you have brought with you the office of lagal priest..."[cite: 1]
"You have brought with you the noble sceptre, you have brought with you the staff and crook..."[cite: 1]
Enki spoke to holy Inana: "In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will establish ...... in my abzu for the woman."[cite: 1]
"May the citizens of your city, Inana, the citizens of Unug, live ......!"[cite: 1]
